long_form.title: The Great Escape: How Billions Escaped Extreme Poverty (1820-2024)
long_form.description: Witness humanity's most dramatic economic transformation over the last two centuries as billions of people escaped extreme poverty. This video visualizes the monumental historical shift, revealing unprecedented global progress and the forces behind it. Understand the incredible journey from a world dominated by destitution to one with significantly reduced extreme poverty. Data source: Our World in Data.

short.title: East Asia's 11-Year Shockwave: From #11 to #5, Nobody Saw It Coming #Shorts
short.description: Witness the unprecedented 11-year economic surge in East Asia between 1869 and 1880, as it climbed from #11 to #5 globally. This rapid transformation caught the world by surprise, marking a pivotal moment in economic history.
